title: centella umbellata
intro: Centella umbellata, also known as Gotu Kola or Indian Pennywort, is a perennial plant in the family Hydrocharitaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in triterpenoids and flavonoids, which are responsible for its health benefits, such as improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting skin health. Centella umbellata can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and topical creams, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and modern herbal remedies.
